name: chatgpt-pro-browser
description: Use your logged-in ChatGPT (incl. Pro) from the terminal by driving the real Chrome browser. Two skills: chatgpt-pro-browser (call Pro / files / multi-turn) and chatgpt-pro-planner (executable plans via Pro).

interface.shortDescription: Drive your logged-in ChatGPT Pro; generate executable plans.
defaultPrompt: 用我的 ChatGPT Pro 做个开发计划
plan a refactor with chatgpt pro
